text: The Director or a representative of the Director may certify to all official acts and issue subpoenas for attendance of witnesses and the production of books and papers.
markdown:
## Title 43
### Chapter 485
##### § 485.195 — Powers of officer conducting hearing.

The Director or a representative of the Director may certify to all official acts and issue subpoenas for attendance of witnesses and the production of books and papers.

subsections.text: The Director or a representative of the Director may certify to all official acts and issue subpoenas for attendance of witnesses and the production of books and papers.
